productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men White & Red Check Shirt
description: Composition Red and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, with a tipped collar and fabric inseam, front button placket, short Sleeve with white fabric tape hems and a patch pocket on left chest with a button closure and two patch pockets on top of the main pocket Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Look cool, get stylish in this broad check shirt from united colors of benetton. Checks are an all-time favourite and look great with jeans and sandals or suede shoes. So get going in this shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
